repo_subtitle: A curated atlas of GitHub repositories for SLAM, LiDAR, 3D vision, localization, mapping, and robotics research tooling.
repo_subtitle_zh: 基于 GitHub Stars / Lists 整理的 SLAM、激光雷达、三维视觉、定位建图与研究工具导航。

sections.name: SLAM Core
sections.description: Core SLAM systems, odometry pipelines, and robustness-focused front-end/back-end work.
sections.description_zh: SLAM 主算法、里程计系统，以及退化场景与鲁棒性相关工作。

lists.name: SLAM-LIVO
lists.note_zh: 激光-惯导-视觉融合里程计。

lists.name: SLAM-Degenerate
lists.note: Degeneracy analysis and robustness in difficult scenes.
lists.note_zh: 退化场景分析与鲁棒性研究。

sections.name: Localization & Place Recognition
sections.description: Global localization, relocalization, place recognition, and map-based positioning.
sections.description_zh: 全局定位、重定位、地点识别与地图辅助定位。

lists.name: SLAM-Loc
lists.note: Global localization, scan-context, overlap, and neural relocalization.
lists.note_zh: 全局定位、Scan Context、重叠预测与神经重定位。

lists.name: Place Recognition
lists.note: Loop closure and place recognition pipelines.

lists.name: HD-Map
lists.note: HD map resources for localization and autonomy.

sections.name: Mapping & 3D Representation
sections.description: Map representation, point clouds, detection, and neural scene modeling.
sections.description_zh: 地图表达、点云处理、点云检测与神经场景表示。

sections.name: Calibration, Datasets & Tools
sections.description: Calibration, datasets, reusable libraries, and general productivity tools.
sections.description_zh: 标定、数据集、常用库与研究效率工具。

lists.name: Other Tools
lists.note: General tools that support research and engineering workflows.
lists.note_zh: 支撑科研与工程流程的通用工具。

sections.name: Multi-Agent & Platforms
sections.description: Multi-robot SLAM, collaborative perception, multi-LiDAR systems, and platform-specific work.
sections.description_zh: 多机器人 SLAM、协同感知、多激光雷达系统与平台相关资源。

sections.name: Sensors
sections.description: Sensor modalities closely related to SLAM and perception beyond standard LiDAR/cameras.
sections.description_zh: SLAM/感知中常见的扩展传感器方向。

sections.name: Learning, Planning & AI
sections.description: Learning material, planning stacks, language models, and broader research-adjacent topics.
sections.description_zh: 学习资料、规划系统、大模型与周边研究方向。

lists.name: SLAM-learning
lists.note: SLAM tutorials, notes, and educational material.

lists.name: C++ learning
lists.note: C++ learning resources useful for robotics development.
lists.note_zh: 面向机器人开发的 C++ 学习资料。

lists.name: LLM
lists.note_zh: 大模型与智能体/工具相关资源。
